name: goal-tetris
description: Turn Codex goals and milestones into animated, stackable Tetris boards.

interface.shortDescription: Build features, one block at a time
interface.longDescription: Goal Tetris connects to a Codex session and turns each requested feature into its own Tetris map. Meaningful milestones become tetrominoes that fall into place as Codex works.
defaultPrompt: Track this feature with Goal Tetris.
Show my current Goal Tetris boards.
